Notice Of Motion And Motion To Enforce Settlement Agreements With Defendants
Off Calendar Nov-16-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances:

Nayheema Hai, in court, Defendant, in propria persona.

RE: PLAINTIFF CRYSTAL DENNIS' Motion To Enforce Settlement Agreements With Defendants.

Not argued/contested. The court advises Defendant that Dept. 501 is handling this matter.

The court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: Transferred to be heard in department 501 on the same date and at the same time. That department handles all landlord/tenant matters per SF Local Rule 8.10A1.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer. Clerk: Robert Woods. Not Reported. (302/RBU)

PLAINTIFF'S NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION TO ENFORCE SETTLEMENT AGREEMENTS WITH DEFENDANTS
Off Calendar Nov-16-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:

Broderick H. Brown; Broderick H. Brown Law Firm; 510-452-6300; appearing as counsel for plaintiff.
Nayeema Hai; 650-740-2002; defendant, appearing in pro per.

Plaintiff contests the court's tentative ruling. After reviewing the pleadings and listening to oral arguments the court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF'S NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION TO ENFORCE SETTLEMENT AGREEMENTS WITH DEFENDANTS is OFF CALENDAR. Insufficient notice per CCP 1005, 1013 and 1010.6. Proof of service filed on November 14, 2023 (2 days before the hearing in violation of CRC 3.1300(c)) indicates electronic service on October 25, 2023, 15 court days before the hearing. The Court notes that the copy of the "Mutual Release in Full of All Claims and Rights" attached to Roderick Brown's declaration is not executed by the defendants.

Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not Reported. (D501)
